RMBC2: The Ultimate Guide to Modern
Copywriting
Welcome to RMBC2, a comprehensive course on direct response copywriting in the digital age. This document provides an
overview of Stefan's revolutionary approach to copywriting that combines deep research, powerful mechanisms, strategic
briefs, and AI-assisted content creation. RMBC2 transforms you from a copywriter into a "copy thinker" - someone who
commands AI to create compelling sales copy while you focus on strategy and refinement. This guide will walk you through
each module of the course, explaining how the RMBC2 system works across various platforms and formats.

-- 1 of 8 --

Foundations and Context: The New
Copywriting Landscape
Direct Response in 2025
Understanding modern sales
funnels and how they differ across
platforms like Meta and Native
advertising.
Context is King
How product and market
awareness levels dramatically
change your copywriting approach
for different audiences.
Platform-Specific
Journeys
The customer journey from
unawareness to purchase varies by
platform, product type, and pricing
- requiring different copywriting
strategies.
The foundations module sets up everything else in the course, providing essential context for understanding why certain copy
approaches work in specific situations. This recurring theme of context - both platform-specific and awareness-based - will
influence every aspect of your copywriting strategy throughout the course.

-- 2 of 8 --

Deep Research: The Foundation of
Effective Copy
Product Market Awareness
Understanding where your prospects are in their
awareness journey and how that impacts your messaging
approach.
Competitor Research
Analyzing competitor claims, what prospects like/dislike
about them, and how to position your offer effectively.
Psychographic Research
Identifying deep psychological drivers of your target
customers based on their level of product/market
awareness.
Unified Research Document
Combining all research into one comprehensive
document that serves as the foundation for all copy
creation.
The research process creates three detailed documents that are then combined into one unified research document. For
supplement writers, there's also a specialized ingredient research process using Perplexity to quickly gather studies, claims,
and citations - reducing what used to take hours into a five-minute task.

-- 3 of 8 --

Mechanisms: The Heart of Persuasive Copy
What Are Mechanisms?
Unique mechanisms are the distinctive "how it works"
elements that make your offer compelling and different
from competitors. Stefan popularized this concept that has
become central to effective copywriting.
The course provides AI processes for generating powerful
mechanism ideas across various niches, including
supplements, skincare, and high-ticket coaching offers like
Airbnb arbitrage.
Ideation
Using LLMs to generate multiple unique
mechanism ideas based on deep research
Evaluation
Systematic process to select the strongest
mechanism from multiple options
Expansion
Developing the chosen mechanism into
compelling copy format

-- 4 of 8 --

Video Sales Letters: The Evolution of VSLs
1 Traditional Long-Form VSLs
15-50 minute comprehensive video presentations
that walk prospects through the entire sales process.
2 Medium-Length VSLs
6-18 minute videos often used as Meta ads that
balance detail with engagement.
3 ADHD Hook Video Ads
3-7 minute videos with attention-grabbing hooks
used by brands like V Shred and Svelte.
4 Short Video Ads
1.5-2 minute videos that blur the line between VSLs
and video ads, especially on Meta.
The course includes critical training on the differences between in-feed and on-page VSLs, which significantly impacts how you
structure your content. Understanding these VSL formats is essential before creating briefs for different video types.

-- 5 of 8 --

Brief 2.0: The Command Center for AI
Copywriting
The Brief 2.0 is a dramatically expanded version of the original RMBC brief, now serving as a comprehensive 25-point
document that guides AI in creating all types of copy.
Using Claude projects, you can set up a system that automatically generates these comprehensive briefs based on your
research and mechanism, creating a foundation for all your copy needs.
Audience Details
Demographics, psychographics, pain
points, and emotional drivers
Product Information
Mechanism, ingredients, benefits,
unique features, and pricing
Narrative Elements
Background story, expert speakers,
and transformational claims
Credibility Builders
Testimonials, medical endorsements,
and industry recognition
Offer Structure
Pricing, guarantees, bonuses, and
scarcity elements

-- 6 of 8 --

Copy Generation and the Complete
Marketing Ecosystem
From Copy Writer to Copy Thinker
RMBC2 transforms your role from writing copy to
commanding AI to create it while you focus on strategy,
feedback, and refinement. You'll learn to set up Claude
projects for various copy types:
VSLs of all lengths (long, medium, short)
Advertorials (long and short formats)
Product pages and landing pages
Checkout pages with strategic elements
Ads across multiple platforms
Upsells and cross-sells
Email sequences for various purposes
Platform-Specific Advertising
The course includes specialized training for different ad
platforms:
Platform Expert
Meta Stefan
Native Din
Google David O'Connell
TikTok Maxwell Finn
YouTube Tom Clasen
The course also covers the 15 factors that determine your funnel structure, helping you understand which approach works
best for your specific product, audience, and pricing strategy.

-- 7 of 8 --

Advanced Strategies and Ongoing Support
1	Upsell Strategies
Learn to create effective upsells that improve
funnel economics by offering better results, faster
results, improved versions, or solutions to new
problems. 2 Email Marketing Journeys
Master abandoned cart sequences, welcome series,
promotional campaigns, reorder sequences, and
win-back emails for various product types.	3	Bonus Content
Access additional training on CRO best practices
(Ethan from 48 Marketing), e-commerce and
Amazon (Eddie Malouf), funnel economics, and
high-ticket webinars (Dylan Vanas).
4 Future Additions
Stefan promises to continue adding more bonuses
based on student feedback and contributions from
industry experts.
By the end of RMBC2, you'll have mastered a comprehensive system for creating any type of copy for any platform. You'll
understand the psychology behind different funnel structures and be able to generate high-converting copy using AI while
maintaining strategic control as a "copy thinker" rather than just a copywriter.
